prompt: Generate a Chinese news website for finance. Mimic the layout of a news homepage with prominent text articles and a large central media element, like the reference screenshot, focusing on a minimalist white background and clear typography.
searchQueryGenerated: Website screenshot example full page desktop view
prompt_refined: Generate a homepage for a Chinese finance news website. The layout should closely mimic the multi-column structure of image 1, featuring a minimalist white background and clear typography. Include a prominent, large central image element, similar to the main visual in image 1, with an associated headline below it. To the left of this central image, display a column of multiple text-heavy news articles with large, distinct headlines. To the right, arrange a column containing smaller news summaries, opinion pieces, or finance market data sections, consistent with the right-hand content in image 1.
objects: Left column containing multiple text-heavy news articles with large headlines
Right column containing smaller news summaries
Right column containing finance market data sections
